recommendations.title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
recommendations.overview: Nancy Stokes, a retired schoolteacher, is pretty sure she has never had good sex. Now that her husband has died, she is determined to take a tour of sexual vistas that until now she has only imagined. She even has a plan; it involves an anonymous hot

recommendations.title: Do It Like An Hombre
recommendations.overview: Raúl, Eduardo and Santiago have led a happy and "straight" life since their childhood, until, one day, Santiago confesses to them that he is gay.

recommendations.title: Sex and Death 101
recommendations.overview: A guy's life is turned around by an email, which includes the names of everyone he's had sex with and ever will have sex with. His situation gets worse when he encounters a femme fatale who targets men guilty of sex crime.

recommendations.title: Candy Jar
recommendations.overview: Dueling high school debate champs who are at odds on just about everything forge ahead with ambitious plans to get into the colleges of their dreams.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Extreme Movie
recommendations.overview: A sketch comedy movie about the joys and embarrassments of teen sex. But mostly the embarrassments.

recommendations.title: Mickey Blue Eyes
recommendations.overview: An English auctioneer proposes to the daughter of a mafia kingpin, only to realize that certain "favors" would be asked of him.

recommendations.title: La Grande Bouffe
recommendations.overview: Four friends gather at a villa with the intention of eating themselves to death.

recommendations.title: The Party 2
recommendations.overview: A young French teenage girl after moving to a new city falls in love with a boy and is thinking of having sex with him because her girlfriends have already done it.

recommendations.title: Cactus Flower
recommendations.overview: A dentist pretends to be married to avoid commitment, but when he falls for his girlfriend and proposes, he must recruit his lovelorn nurse to pose as his wife.
